word: G4296 - προκηρύσσω - prokērýssō - prok-ay-rooce'-so - Before preach

sections.paragraph:
- Original: προκηρύσσω

- Transliteration: Prokerusso

- Phonetic: prok-ay-rooce'-so

- Definition:

1. to announce or proclaim be herald beforehand

2. to announce beforehand (of the herald himself)

- Origin: from G4253 and G2784

- TDNT entry: 14:57,4

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G4253 and G2784; to herald (that is proclaim) in advance: - before (first) preach.
